serverInfo.name: raid
serverInfo.description: Distributed development environment orchestrator. Manages multi-repo workflows, environments, and tasks via an MCP stdio server.

tools.name: raid_install
tools.description: Clone repositories and run install tasks for the active profile

tools.name: raid_env_switch
tools.description: Switch to a named environment and run its tasks

tools.name: raid_run_task
tools.description: Execute a named command from the active profile

tools.name: raid_list_repos
tools.description: List repositories in the active profile

tools.name: raid_describe_repo
tools.description: Get details about a specific repository by name or path
